name: Saute' Spinach
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the spinach and slice the onion.
2. Heat oil in a wok until it reaches the smoking point. Add the onion to the wok and stir.
3. Add the spinach to the wok and stir from the bottom up. Cover the wok briefly.
4. Lift the cover and continue stirring the spinach until it is wilted. Cook for a full five minutes, alternating between covering and uncovering the wok while stir-frying.
NOTE: Other leafy green vegetables can be similarly cooked, such as lettuce, bok choy, celery, cabbage, and rucula.
